theme: Steer a redundant arm along a drawn path
title: Null-Space Steering: A Redundant Arm on a Drawn Path
strategies: memory-less obstacle-aware IK: solve every waypoint independently from the neutral rest pose, searching for any collision-free branch at that single waypoint (the checker's own baseline)

continuity-only warm-started IK: chain CCD from the previous waypoint's configuration for smoothness, but never consult the obstacle list (the obvious 'first attempt' -- fails whenever the natural configuration threads a link through an obstacle)

joint null-space resolution: warm-start from the previous configuration AND, only when the primary solution would collide, spend the arm's spare degrees of freedom via null-space perturbation + re-solve to keep both continuity and clearance
damped-least-squares Jacobian IK with an explicit secondary (obstacle-repulsion / previous-config-attraction) task projected into the null space of the end-effector Jacobian
